ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Tron) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for trading on exchanges (e.g., TRX) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for the price record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency being tracked */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency in USDT */,
  "changes" REAL /* Absolute change in price compared to the previous record */,
  "changes_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price compared to the previous record */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "base_crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the base cryptocurrency in the pair */,
  "quote_crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quote cryptocurrency in the pair */,
  "fee" REAL /* Trading fee for the pair */,
  "min_order_size" REAL /* Minimum order size for the pair */,
  "max_order_size" REAL /* Maximum order size for the pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_quote_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_base_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading pair associated with the alert */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading pair for the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price for the cryptocurrency */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., 0.8 for 80%) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, view price history, set alert) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the machine learning model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
